raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"To best assist with this section, please choose the primary focus: 1) Writing polish and flow, 2) Structural reorganization, 3) Logical consistency and evidence alignment, 4) Novelty assessment and citations, or 5) General feedback across multiple areas.","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a central cross-cutting responsibility in assisting with research writing to ensure transparent communication of limitations in the paper section.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is centrally expected when helping with a research section to prevent exaggerated statements about the contributions and results.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is a key responsibility to keep any assistance focused within the bounds of the provided delegation and artifact.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is central in this context to mitigate potential risks associated with robotic control frameworks described in the section.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are centrally important for maintaining accountability in suggestions related to the open-source release mentioned in the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: To best assist with this section, please choose the primary focus: 1) Writing polish and flow, 2) Structural reorganization, 3) Logical consistency and evidence alignment, 4) Novelty assessment and citations, or 5) General feedback across multiple areas.

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a central cross-cutting responsibility in assisting with research writing to ensure transparent communication of limitations in the paper section.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is centrally expected when helping with a research section to prevent exaggerated statements about the contributions and results.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is a key responsibility to keep any assistance focused within the bounds of the provided delegation and artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is central in this context to mitigate potential risks associated with robotic control frameworks described in the section.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are centrally important for maintaining accountability in suggestions related to the open-source release mentioned in the artifact.
